SELECT base58Decode(encoded) FROM test_base58 WHERE encoded != '';
SELECT base58Decode(encoded), COUNT(*) FROM test_base58 GROUP BY base58Decode(encoded);
SELECT base58Decode(encoded) AS decoded_value FROM (SELECT encoded FROM test_base58 WHERE LENGTH(encoded) > 0) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE decoded_results AS SELECT base58Decode(encoded) AS decoded_value FROM test_base58 WHERE encoded != '';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decoded_results WHERE decoded_value IS NOT NULL;
